name: taskwarrior-kanban
description: A live, terminal-homage Kanban board for Taskwarrior.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c green,cyan "pnpm -C server dev" "pnpm -C web dev"
scripts.dev:demo: TASKRC=$PWD/.devtask/taskrc TASKDATA=$PWD/.devtask/data concurrently -n server,web -c green,cyan "pnpm -C server dev" "pnpm -C web dev"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -C server typecheck && pnpm -C web typecheck
scripts.start:demo: TASKRC=$PWD/.devtask/taskrc TASKDATA=$PWD/.devtask/data pnpm build && TASKRC=$PWD/.devtask/taskrc TASKDATA=$PWD/.devtask/data NODE_ENV=production pnpm -C server start
